title: erigeron tricholepis
intro: Erigeron tricholepis, also known as the coastal daisy, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. Erigeron tricholepis can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
